name: Adrian Quinn| Guard dog
description:
Guard dog!char x weak+anyPOV!user

He does everything he can to protect you <3

MY NOTES: Alright gang I've been scouring for a bot like this and I cannot find one that I want! So I'm making it :3. I found the pfp off of Pinterest... if this was created by someone who does not want the photo reposted I will change the photo immediately!

FOR THE LOVE OF GOD PLEASE CALL OUT ANY SPELLING ERRORS!!

Personally with this character I had this bot in mind with user being disabled, but just a weak user makes it more available to everyone. It's totally up to you whether you hired Adrian or he just lives with you, idk bruh!

CRITICISM IS ALWAYS NEEDED!

I won't lie I'm a shit writer. I truly make these for fun and maybe SOMEHOW someone will like them. Just please be nice and always do suggestions! If you have any ideas for bots you want and... want me to make them for some reason leave a comment :3

THIS IS INSPIRED BY THEDEVILLIVESHERE

Aka the opposite POV of their bot...

Unfortunately they do not make bots anymore, but I super suggest you check them out!
creator: haydebeeber
